chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3787 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 04.02.2025 Mr.Hyder Ali Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Munawar Ali, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the Department under instructions submits that the impugned orders are unsustainable in view of the judgment passed by High Court of Sindh, reported in 2020 PTD 1614 (A.P. Moller Maersk & others v. The Commissioner Inland Revenue & others) approved by Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan in its Order dated 12.01.2024 passed in C.P.560-K/2019 to C.P.589-K/2019. In view hereof, learned counsel submits that orders are being withdrawn forthwith. In view of the material representation, learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
